subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-18 in London
subcodes.first_line: Whenever the promised Manifestations had yet to appear, the masses sought after them desperately and eagerly awaited their appearance
subcodes.first_line_orig: قبل از ظهور موعود چگونه خلق حالت طلب و انتظار داشتند و بدرگاه پروردگار دعا و تضرع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prophecy and fulfillment
